title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Khadim's Capital India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Khadim's Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Khadim's Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Khadim's Capital India:
Khadim's Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's Capital India!
